code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut line_start = 0
mut last_start = 0
mut last_stop = 0
mut found = false

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      let line = string.substring(input, line_start, i)
      if not string.is_empty(string.trim(line))
        last_start = line_start
        last_stop = i
        found = true
      end
      line_start = i + 1
    when _
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if line_start < n
  let tail = string.substring(input, line_start, n)
  if not string.is_empty(string.trim(tail))
    last_start = line_start
    last_stop = n
    found = true
  end
end

if found
  println(string.substring(input, last_start, last_stop))
else
  println("(none)")
end
